items: Weekly export name in Settings is stored per pilot (legacy name copies once on login).
Flight log: 15-minute post-save window is stored per pilot and survives refresh; updating a flight no longer resets the form or the timer.
Stats: takeoff and landing site rows use the same bar layout alignment as the monthly chart.
Pilot nav: FF tab label is now D/Sheet.
Settings → glider editor: first day this wing was flown + Apply to log (fills empty wing_reg on past flights from that date for Stats).
Pilot ground status: signed out, available, down bottom (off dispatch); office lists and card colours updated.
Flight log: 15-minute post-save mode, new flight control, duplicate save guard, and server 409 on duplicate flights.
Office: today refresh, flight log column order, newest-first flights, duplicate send-away removed from groups.
Stats: estimated wing replacement date from 12-month usage rate; pilot log dates show year.
Gliders and last wing choice are stored per pilot (legacy data migrates on login).
Duty hours: suggestion from sign-in/out logs (prefills empty day totals when possible).
Georges weekly CSV: strict validation before export and confirmation with exact filename.
Safer sign-out when a timer is still running; office-landed placeholder flights highlighted to complete.
